generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mom and someone who values stability, I've been thinking about our alliances. While I believe in standing with our partners, we can't ignore how much we're carrying the burden. Did you know that in 2025, the U.S. spent 3.4% of GDP on defense while our allies averaged just 1.6%? That's not fair to our families' futures. We need allies who step up equally. #StrongerTogetherButFairly
